Today was the most beautiful sunny day of the year. Grok said I had a 50 to 70% chance to view the sunrise. This is the value of AI. Decentralized Thought of the Day: How to cure the incurable dengue fever in 4 hours flat.
0\. Ensure 100% that the person has dengue via professional diagnosis / blood analysis. Do not apply this treatment unless they have dengue (any strain). Best time is when they go to the doctor and are told to quarantine for 7 days.
1\. Get fresh papaya leaves, don't pick more than one leaf from a tree else you risk harming the tree. Select the youngest leaves and a few older leaves but nothing really old. Get about 6 or 10 leaves, 6 for small folks 10 for big folks.
2\. Put the leaves in a professional juicer, stand back from the EF current as much as possible while the juicer is doing its thing. Get about 1/4 a cup of juice (papaya leaves are very dry) or a bit more if you have 10 leaves.
3\. Dilute with water - have person hold their nose and drink it all - likely do not have anything in their stomach to interfere by now as they've been starving the bone breaker fever by instinct.
4\. The person is likely under quarantine in the hospital by this stage. DO NOT tell the Rockefeller educated doctors what's going on. They are likely getting temperature checks by a nurse every 2 hours at this stage or if very late they were sent home to die. Either way, observe for 4 hours. Bonus is to wait for the nurses temperature check and their facial expressions when the fever is gone. Tell them you have good genes. Flirt with the doctors and nurses until they kick you out of quarantine. Rolled in on a wheelchair and walking in 4 hours. They will likely demand you return at 7 day mark to confirm and likely will keep you there for 2 more nights after initial fever break. I once met a PhD in dengue, I just smiled, the US embassy in Thailand has a full crew looking for a "vaccine". The papaya was brought world wide by the Spanish as they carried it on their ships and learnt in South American of its ability to heal fevers from insect born pathogens. Should have full crew Saturday but weather not so great. I got a solid 1.5 hours of sunlight on Araha Beach.

# Thread: CIRS Mold Recovery Journey & Vo2Max - VIP Spray & 18 point jump in Runner's VO2Max in 3 days
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cirs-mold-recovery-journey-vo2max-vip-spray-18-point-jump-in-runners-vo2max-in-3-days.32334/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Marathonman — 2026-03-03T06:24:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cirs-mold-recovery-journey-vo2max-vip-spray-18-point-jump-in-runners-vo2max-in-3-days.32334/post-367974>

Working through an interesting health journey. Any and all input is appreciated! Thankful to have stumbled upon Dr. Kruse.

**CIRS Mold & Vo2Max 18 point jump in 3 days

Contents:**

1.  Temporarily Gaining 18 points on Vo2Max
2.  Start of VO2 Decrease
3.  Fast Forward
4.  Marathon Training -
5.  Prescription History
6.  Pulmonary Function Test
7.  Starting Shoemaker Protocol
8.  Light Sensitivity
9.  Current Supplements
10.  Current Situation
11.  Questions / Asking for Needle Movers
12.  Bloodwork @ bottom of page

**Temporarily Gaining 18 points on Vo2Max**

Vo2max Lab test: ~53 in August 25'
23 days later had a Vo2max Indicator workout 3 days into VIP spray: **~71 VO2max indicated** (9+ miles of effort on a treadmill, I can provide the calculation method here if anyone requests)
Around 2 weeks into VIP last fall… Started feeling worse on it and had to stop.. Possibly ramped the dosage to fast, had MMP-9 too high or re-exposure.. The high sugar intake I had along with limited DHA + training stress probably is the reason why MMP-9 went up from ~May 25 to Aug 25....

Start of vo2 decrease
\-Vo2 decreased and did not recover…
\- Daily Ibuprofen (NSAID) usage 1.5-2 months leading into it
\-High Gluten, Sugar Diet
\-**Night Owl Behavior** (Video games til 2am on weekends.., near zero morning sun…
\-**Living in / exposed to mold exposure (home..)**
\-Very Low Body Fat - **Possibly the skinny version of Leptin Issues..**
\- Very Pale
\-possibly **Occurred in Late January/Early February**…IE: low Vitamin D and sunlight exposure… Near absolute minimum of sunlight exposure for the year.
\-Medium/High Workout Stress - from Indoor running/sports

**Fast Forward**
I moved out, a family member still lived there. I would react when visiting the house or when
(brainfog, decreased VO2.) near / in proximity to this person.

**Marathon Training**
One of the Marathon Training blocks got me outside in the morning and along with a few health rabbit holes had me doing some of the right things….

-   Running morning sunlight for 1 hour 6-7 days a week with 1-2 hours of afternoon sunlight in the schedule.
-   Intermittent fasting - Helping Leptin Sensitivty - IE: no late night eating
-   Need to sleep to recover had me in bed by 10 every night…
-   Vo2max trended up
-   Acne went away….
-   Return to night owl behavior post race and was re-exposed to mold..
-   Acne returned

**Prescription History:**
Minocycline - for Acne - didn’t really work

Nystatin for mold
Liposomal Glutathione before cholestramine: Gave me brainfog & substantially decreased motor coordination… Like add 35-40+ strokes to 18 hole of golf…

Accutane - CIRS mold could have caused worse side effects

-   Joints/tendons… -> Hard to go down stairs at peak dosage felt like I was going to blow my knees out. Had to lower peak dosageit…
-   Very sensitive to light. As in sunglassess in the office sensitive.. Headlights from other cars at night to bright..

**Pulmonary Function Test:**
While feeling short of breath this came back as → “good”

Report: Spirometry is within normal limits & Mild mild response to inhaled bronchodilators noted.

–I don’t have a great understanding of what this measures, but I can tell you my run performance was greatly reduced at the time of measurement.

**Starting Shoemaker Protocol**

Cholestyramine: Initially gave me a substantial detox reaction in the first 1 -2 months. Brainfog + substantially decrease exercise tolerance / Vo2Max.
\-Experienced constipation on this as well. Symptoms got progressively worse ad constipation worsened.

3-4 Months in had the 2nd light sensitivity event happen (see below ).

**Light Sensitivity 2 times.-**
Have had 2x light sensitivity events with depth perception, migraine and field of view loss
1st time I was on accutane and dialed the dosage back to go on a ski trip a few years ago (to not blow out my knees..) and had taken my goggles off for a few minutes
2nd time was 3-4months into cholestramine: was outside for 60-90 minutes in a hat and sunglasses(before knowing about circadian theories..)
\-Vision symptoms were better within a few hours
\-Migraine got better over a few days
\-Sensitivity to light improved over a few days.

My eyes were checked out by an optomologists.. Came back great 20/20 vision, no damage besides an astigmatism that was already there.

AI query seems to link the light sensitivity to the atrophy/swelling region/regions from my neuroquant.

**Neuroquant:**
“Dr Mcmahon has reviewed your neuro quant and thinks that it will take a bit on the VIP for you to see changes. "He scored a 4/8 for mold on his NQ, with caudate nucleus, pallidum and hippocampal atrophy, which buys him a year of VIP at 12 sp or more a day.”
\-Symptoms - Memory doesn't feel as good as it used to before the mold exposure.
\-If it helps I can add the Neuroquant Data Here.

**Supplements:**
Fish Oil
Thiamine B1 TTFD
TUDCA (extra Bile + protein folding support
Phospholipid Compex (protien folding )
Sodium Butryate.
B-Complex
Iodine
Vitamin A
Zinc Carnosine

**Current Situation:**

\-> Found this forum (from someone on here [Unfolded Protein Response and A Possible Treatment for CFS | Phoenix Rising ME/CFS Forums](https://forums.phoenixrising.me/threads/unfolded-protein-response-and-a-possible-treatment-for-cfs.37244/)) about someone fixing their CFS from Finasteride. GIve my usage of accutane I was interested. Had taken fish oil for 6 weeks + a few servings of salmon / week. Took 250mg of tudca in the evening, the next morning my brainfog (that had been around for a long time atleast the 12+ months of cholestyramine maybe longer was gone.. Couldn’t believe it. Still gaining an understanding but it either added bile into my system accutane reduced the signalling for or helped out with unfolded proteins that mold +accutane degraded.. .

\-> Working with MoldCo - a Telehealth company that applies the Shoemaker Protocol.

\-> Passed VCS test ~ 2 weeks ago
38-39 Latitude - ~6000ft elevation - Chunk of time in Cities
Skied 3.5 hours with no shirts in the last month
Was very pale 2 months ago, started getting as much sun as I can. Now closer to being tanned. Getting tanner every week (“Tan your hide”)
\- Likely skin type 2.5-3 range.

-   Dairy seems to decrease lung function dramatically, cutting this out in preparation for VIP and next marathon block

**Bloodwork (short version)**
High MMP-9
Low Alpha MSH
High Eosinophils
Thyroid panel has room for improvement. (TSH a little higher than ideal. )

**Environment:**
Apartment -> Using HEPA Air Filters running 24/7
Wifi off at night

Weekdays
\-10-30 minutes of morning sunlight weekdays
\-20-45+Minutes outside at peak UV and 30+
\-Blue light blockers 2+ hours before bed

Weekends
\-30-90 minutes of am sunlight on weekends
\-2-4 hours of peak UV - in running shorts
\-Blue light blockers 2+ hours before bed

Prescriptions:
Choleystramine - Bile Sequestrant for mold/mycotoxins
\-> Plan to start VIP spray in the next 1-2 weeks to recover VO2max and Neuro..

Diet: Low Amylose Diet + High Dosage Omega 3 (to lower mmp-9.)

Expecting to start VIP spray in the next 1-2 weeks. -> Vasoactive Intesitnal Peptide

**Questions:**
I realize I’m ignorant and missing a lot here. Feedback & ideas are appreciated. Eager to learn.

Why did TUDCA help nearly immediately? 1 nights sleep…
\-General thoughts->

\-How to improve the water and magnetism part of the equation in my recovery

### Mat.I — 2026-03-04T00:46:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/cirs-mold-recovery-journey-vo2max-vip-spray-18-point-jump-in-runners-vo2max-in-3-days.32334/post-368037>

> [Marathonman said:](/goto/post?id=367974)
>
> Working through an interesting health journey. Any and all input is appreciated! Thankful to have stumbled upon Dr. Kruse.
>
> **CIRS Mold & Vo2Max 18 point jump in 3 days
>
>
> Contents:**
>
> 1.  Temporarily Gaining 18 points on Vo2Max
> 2.  Start of VO2 Decrease
> 3.  Fast Forward
> 4.  Marathon Training - A few years ago
> 5.  Prescription History
> 6.  Pulmonary Function Test
> 7.  Starting Shoemaker Protocol
> 8.  Light Sensitivity
> 9.  Current Supplements
> 10.  Current Situation
> 11.  Questions / Asking for Needle Movers
> 12.  Bloodwork @ bottom of page
>
>
>
> **Temporarily Gaining 18 points on Vo2Max**
>
> Vo2max Lab test: ~53 in August 25'
> 23 days later had a Vo2max Indicator workout 3 days into VIP spray: **~71 VO2max indicated** (9+ miles of effort on a treadmill, I can provide the calculation method here if anyone requests)
> Around 2 weeks into VIP last fall… Started feeling worse on it and had to stop.. Possibly ramped the dosage to fast, had MMP-9 too high or re-exposure.. The high sugar intake I had along with limited DHA + training stress probably is the reason why MMP-9 went up from ~May 25 to Aug 25....
>
>
>
> Start of vo2 decrease Years ago
> \-Got Bronchitits and Vo2 decreased and did not recover…
> \- Daily Ibuprofen (NSAID) usage 1.5-2 months leading into it
> \-High Gluten, Sugar Diet
> \-**Night Owl Behavior** (Video games til 2am on weekends.., near zero morning sun…
> \-**Living in mold exposure (home..)**
> \-Very Low Body Fat - **Possibly the skinny version of Leptin Issues..**
> \- Very Pale
> \-**Occurred in Late January/Early February**…IE: low Vitamin D and sunlight exposure… Near absolute minimum of sunlight exposure for the year.
> \-Medium/High Workout Stress - from Indoor running/sports
>
>
> **Fast Forward**
> I moved out, a family member still lived there. I would react when visiting the house or when
> (brainfog, decreased VO2.) near / in proximity to this person.
>
>
>
> **Marathon Training - A few years ago**
> One of the Marathon Training blocks got me outside in the morning and along with a few health rabbit holes had me doing some of the right things….
>
>
> -   Running morning sunlight for 1 hour 6-7 days a week with 1-2 hours of afternoon sunlight in the schedule.
> -   Intermittent fasting - Helping Leptin Sensitivty - IE: no late night eating
> -   Need to sleep to recover had me in bed by 10 every night…
> -   Vo2max trended up the the highest sustained it had been at in years
> -   Acne went away….
> -   Return to night owl behavior post race and was re-exposed to mold..
> -   Acne returned
>
>
> **Prescription History:**
> Minocycline - for Acne - didn’t really work
>
> Nystatin for mold
> Liposomal Glutathione before cholestramine: Gave me brainfog & substantially decreased motor coordination… Like add 35-40+ strokes to 18 hole of golf…
>
>
> Accutane - CIRS mold could have caused worse side effects
>
> -   Joints/tendons… -> Hard to go down stairs at peak dosage felt like I was going to blow my knees out. Had to lower peak dosageit…
> -   Very sensitive to light. As in sunglassess in the office sensitive.. Headlights from other cars at night to bright..
>
>
> **Pulmonary Function Test:**
> While feeling short of breath this came back as → “good”
>
> Report: Spirometry is within normal limits & Mild mild response to inhaled bronchodilators noted.
>
> –I don’t have a great understanding of what this measures, but I can tell you my run performance was greatly reduced at the time of measurement.
>
>
> **Starting Shoemaker Protocol**
>
> Cholestyramine: Initially gave me a substantial detox reaction in the first 1 -2 months. Brainfog + substantially decrease exercise tolerance / Vo2Max.
> \-Experienced constipation on this as well. Symptoms got progressively worse ad constipation worsened.
>
> 3-4 Months in had the 2nd light sensitivity event happen (see below ).
>
>
> **Light Sensitivity 2 times.-**
> Have had 2x light sensitivity events with depth perception, migraine and field of view loss
> 1st time I was on accutane and dialed the dosage back to go on a ski trip a few years ago (to not blow out my knees..) and had taken my goggles off for a few minutes
> 2nd time was 3-4months into cholestramine: was outside for 60-90 minutes in a hat and sunglasses(before knowing about circadian theories..)
> \-Vision symptoms were better within a few hours
> \-Migraine got better over a few days
> \-Sensitivity to light improved over a few days.
>
> My eyes were checked out by an optomologists.. Came back great 20/20 vision, no damage besides an astigmatism that was already there.
>
> AI query seems to link the light sensitivity to the atrophy/swelling region/regions from my neuroquant.
>
>
> **Neuroquant:**
> “Dr Mcmahon has reviewed your neuro quant and thinks that it will take a bit on the VIP for you to see changes. "He scored a 4/8 for mold on his NQ, with caudate nucleus, pallidum and hippocampal atrophy, which buys him a year of VIP at 12 sp or more a day.”
> \-Symptoms - Memory doesn't feel as good as it used to before the mold exposure.
> \-If it helps I can add the Neuroquant Data Here.
>
>
> **Supplements:**
> Fish Oil
> Thiamine B1 TTFD
> TUDCA (extra Bile + protein folding support
> Phospholipid Compex (protien folding )
> Sodium Butryate.
> B-Complex
> Iodine
> Vitamin A
> Zinc Carnosine
>
>
> **Current Situation:**
>
> \-> Found this forum (from someone on here [Unfolded Protein Response and A Possible Treatment for CFS | Phoenix Rising ME/CFS Forums](https://forums.phoenixrising.me/threads/unfolded-protein-response-and-a-possible-treatment-for-cfs.37244/)) about someone fixing their CFS from Finasteride. GIve my usage of accutane I was interested. Had taken fish oil for 6 weeks + a few servings of salmon / week. Took 250mg of tudca in the evening, the next morning my brainfog (that had been around for a long time atleast the 12+ months of cholestyramine maybe longer was gone.. Couldn’t believe it. Still gaining an understanding but it either added bile into my system accutane reduced the signalling for or helped out with unfolded proteins that mold +accutane degraded.. .
>
> \-> Working with MoldCo - a Telehealth company that applies the Shoemaker Protocol.
>
>
> \-> Passed VCS test ~ 2 weeks ago
> 38-39 Latitude - ~6000ft elevation - Chunk of time in Cities
> Skied 3.5 hours with no shirts in the last month
> Was very pale 2 months ago, started getting as much sun as I can. Now closer to being tanned. Getting tanner every week (“Tan your hide”)
> \- Likely skin type 2.5-3 range.
>
>
> -   Dairy seems to decrease lung function dramatically, cutting this out in preparation for VIP and next marathon block
>
>
>
> **Bloodwork (short version)**
> High MMP-9
> Low Alpha MSH
> High Eosinophils
> Thyroid panel has room for improvement. (TSH a little higher than ideal. )
>
>
> **Environment:**
> Apartment -> Using HEPA Air Filters running 24/7
> Wifi off at night
>
> Weekdays
> \-10-30 minutes of morning sunlight weekdays
> \-20-45+Minutes outside at peak UV and 30+
> \-Blue light blockers 2+ hours before bed
>
> Weekends
> \-30-90 minutes of am sunlight on weekends
> \-2-4 hours of peak UV - in running shorts
> \-Blue light blockers 2+ hours before bed
>
> Prescriptions:
> Choleystramine - Bile Sequestrant for mold/mycotoxins
> \-> Plan to start VIP spray in the next 1-2 weeks to recover VO2max and Neuro..
>
> Diet: Low Amylose Diet + High Dosage Omega 3 (to lower mmp-9.)
>
>
> Expecting to start VIP spray in the next 1-2 weeks. -> Vasoactive Intesitnal Peptide
>
>
> **Questions:**
> I realize I’m ignorant and missing a lot here. Feedback & ideas are appreciated. Eager to learn.
>
> Why did TUDCA help nearly immediately? 1 nights sleep…
> \-General thoughts->
> \- Accutane decreased bile flow & decrease Protein Folding Efficiency
>
>
> \-How to improve the water and magnetism part of the equation in my recovery
>
>
> -   I understand the Cold Rx & Leptin Rx are applicable for my situation.
>
>
> \-Should the Eosinophils be something to worry about / focus on here?
>
>
> What’s the biggest needle mover or movers I should tackle next for VO2max & Brain recovery?
>
> \- Thanks
>
> Bloodwork below

You have helped inspire me to transform and reclaim my life with your lessons and wisdom. I'm turning 40 this year, and it feels like I've been asleep for twenty years only to awaken to a new life full of drive, ambition, and wonder in learning. This was only possible after gradual and incremental changes in my life including seeing the sunrise everyday all thanks to you.

I'm a bitcoiner now, and I even started my own business that has a Bitcoin infrastructure division.

Among many projects and goals that I now have, a central goal of mine is to visit you in El Salvador. I would very much like to see your amazing place, eat a mango from the tree, visit the volcano, and sip some wine at sunset shooting the shit with you about the latest physics catastrophe: the gravity conundrum. I also look forward to shit talking my profession with you; the one I'm currently trying to get out of - pharmacy.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-release-for-mitos%E2%80%94-sunshine-and-seabreeze.32416/post-369145>

Sunshine & Seabreeze

Verse 1

I feel so empty just starin’ at a screen,

It steals my days and then my nights,

I traded freedom for this pixilated dream,

Even now I can’t remember why.

Verse 2

But something’s calling me beyond the blue light haze,

It tells me living here and now can make things new,

Life can offer us a world of so much more,

And sunshine can make it all come true.

Sunshine and sea breeze

Airplane mode baby no 5G

Soak your body—full spectrum UV

Sunshine and sea breeze.

Verse 3

I can’t keep living in this artificial world,

The screen will never tell me who I am,

But the ocean breeze is whispering the truth,

Just step out into nature when you can.

Verse 4

The air is clean and clear, the shadows slip away,

Ooooh how good the sunshine feels,

I let the sunshine put me to sleep,

And oh! How the morning light heals!

Sunshine and sea breeze

Airplane mode baby no 5G

Soak your body—full spectrum UV

Sunshine and sea breeze.

By Shanti and the Leashbreakers

Enjoy!!!

# Thread: Optimal Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/optimal-journal.32435/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### RyanFick — 2026-03-22T01:38:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/optimal-journal.32435/post-369340>

About me
\-Currently living near Detroit, Michigan and have been here for about a decade. Born in North Carolina.

\-17 years old. 5'10" 155 lbs

\-Mother and grandmother are both in good health, no issues at the moment. Unsure of my haplotype, fitzpatrick III roughly (mother/grandmother are the same). Assuming I'm pretty uncoupled, got up to doing 5.5 minutes in 32F water over the winter despite not having good redox

\-Got jabbed 3x in 2021

\-High school distance runner, have been since 2021. Very active lifetyle lifting and running

Issues
\-Have had pretty bad leaky gut since late 2022.

\-Started getting bad acne and some dermatitis around the same time as leaky gut. Been unable to resolve both issues so far despite trying a lot the past 4 years

\-Extremely low ferritin, serum iron, hemoglobin despite an animal based diet, seafood, sunlight, grounding, sunrise, etc. (improved with supplementation, ferritin is far from optimal still (~10 ng/ml)

\-Mental clarity and my ability to think isn't where it once was. Excelled in school up until 2020, have felt like my brain's stuck in fog since then. Has improved considerably since implementing Jack's protocols.

\-Fatigue. Nothing crazy but I've been feeling far from optimal for a long time

Things I've been doing since I found Jack (early 2025)
\-Never miss a sunrise. Only exception has been during the winter at school- had to miss some but would get a glimpse ~30 mins after

\-Minimizing ALAN as much as possible. Using a red light if I have to do something, but most nights now that the light cycles are longer are ALAN free

\-Spending as much time outside as possible. Sunbathing whenever I get the opportunity, CT in the winter every day. Shirtless runs and walks, and CT in the creek a few times a week. Grounding whenever possible as well

\-Mitigating tech use/EMF as much as possible. Spending less time on tech in general, phone almost always on airplane mode, distancing myself from cell towers, routers, etc. Sleeping environment (measured with Trifield TF2) has the RF ~20-80 microwatts/m2, EF 0-5 V/m, MF .2 mG. Blackout curtains in room, sleep mask, ear plugs during sleep

\-All devices have a red filter, blue blockers as well if not outside using them. Blocking artificial light during the day whenever I'm exposed to it. Been very consistent with blocking blue light

\-Eating seasonally and locally mostly. Lots of seafood, animal based eating. Only non seasonal foods were sweet potatoes in the winter (read EMF 4- feels like I cannot perform optimally without carbs). Using CO as the main fat in the diet right now to help the leaky gut, although I haven't noticed better results with it yet

Things to note
\-Most of my issues resolved last summer when I didn't have school. I'm in a 2000+ person school and it's an EMF hellhole. I do what I can to mitigate (wearing blue blockers and long sleeves) but I don't think there's much I can do for the RF other than waiting until I'm out of school.

\-Tested VD3 last fall, came out to 150 nmol/L (no supplementation). Got very melinated as well, unfortunately most of that melanin got destroyed in the winter due to school. **Note-** my face was noticeably more pale than the rest of my body (genital area was as well, sunbathed naked when possible though) indicating a melanin deficiency in the brain

\-Ferritin was 17 ng/ml in the spring, then dropped to around 5 ng/ml in the late summer after getting tons of sun, doing everything "right" as far as I can tell. Not sure exactly why this is, although I know it's a sign my redox is poor. Maybe a protective mechanism for the RF I'm exposed to?

\-Some labs (don't have a lot, but some useful labs):
\-**BUN/creatinine**: ~20
\-HDL: 74 mg/dL
\-LDL: 219 mg/dL
\-Triglycerides: 58 mg/dL
\-**Hemoglobin**: 13.3 g/dL (was 11.5 before supplementing heme iron. Hematocrit and MCV were also very low)
\-**Ferritin**: 10 ng/ml

Any feedback is greatly appreciated. Thank you to Jack for all the work you do, it has changed my life so far for the better. I'm excited to keep learning and becoming more like a savage.


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Thread: My Journal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.32521/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Dee Dee — 2026-04-08T11:49:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-journal.32521/post-370472>

Grew up stable home, parents together, always out on the lake surfing behind the boat and lots of beautiful fresh seafood. Started eating oysters as a baby

60 y.o. Aussie woman, non- smoker; mum of 4 (including twins) and proud nan of 2 little boys.

Caesarean birth, bottle fed, mother smoked in pregnancy- born one month early.

Migraine and colic / IBS (from childhood); German Measles; Glandular Fever (16); Episodes of back pain (Fibrositis at 19); sinus issues.

Always hard to wake up mornings. Sleepwalker, sleeptalker, acting out dreams (incident recently).

MVA- concussion and whiplash (23); started daily headache; ongoing neck pain then depression and deconditioning.

Tetany (24)

Births two natural (27; 32) and one caesarean (twins) (29); mild sciatica; severe lower back pain episodes.

Spondylolisthesis -rolled over on the lounge (L5/ S1) (40). Tried nerve blocks, medications, therapies and eventually opted for a fusion (L5/S1) (at 43). Helped sciatica but more pain in low back and legs. 3 Foramotomies for scar tissue, spurs etc causing weakness and pain and spinal cyst.

Sleep disorder (not enough REM sleep- told to nap- helps).

Diplopia (Double Vision Cranial Nerve V! (virus or blood clot on my brain). Horrendous headache and eye pain. Diplopia lasted 3 months and left with chronic migraine and pain behind both eyes. Chronic Fatigue Syndrome and Fibromyalgia diagnosed 2009 (at 44)- extremely ill with flu like symptoms, sweating, sore glands, fatigue. For many years I couldn’t read (voracious reader).

Was a single mum raising 4 kids and studying Psych by distance. Graduated 4th year 2018. Unable to work. Extreme stress in my marriage- husband abusive. Loved being a mum.

Perimenopause symptoms rough especially sweating. Menopause really rough- sweating, hot flushes, insomnia, extreme depression, muscle pain (worse than normal), joint pain (I dont usually have). Irritability and anger and felt nuts. Tried different things. HRT has given me my life back.
Previous endometriosis (good now).

Craved and ate oysters in my pregnancies. I lived an outdoors life with my children, swimming and bbq’s at the beach or lake.

Been spending long hours at the beach every day.

Currently -severe thoracic pain (physio helping). Lost 14 kg so far (Endep caused weight gain).

Cheers everyone,
Donna


══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Thread: The Privilege of a Lifetime
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-privilege-of-a-lifetime.32580/unread>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jenelle — 2026-04-18T14:33:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-privilege-of-a-lifetime.32580/post-371404>

**"The privilege of a lifetime is being who you are.**

What you have to do, you do with play.

Life is without meaning. You bring the meaning to it.

The meaning of life is whatever you ascribe it to be. Being alive is the meaning.

The **warrior**'s approach is to say 'yes' to life: 'yea' to it all.

Participate joyfully in the sorrows of the world.

We cannot cure the world of sorrows, but we can choose to live in joy.

When we talk about settling the world's problems, we're barking up the wrong tree.

The world is perfect. It's a mess. It has always been a mess.

We are not going to change it.

**Our job is to straighten out our own lives**."

\- Joseph Campbell, A Joseph Campbell Companion: Reflections on the Art of Living

### Jenelle — 2026-04-19T18:51:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-privilege-of-a-lifetime.32580/post-371516>

### Jenelle — 2026-05-05T14:46:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-privilege-of-a-lifetime.32580/post-373103>

It's been almost exactly 3 months since I left a position I will never put my body and soul into again. I am not sorry I took it on in the first place ~ as it was only for a few months, and it was the catalyst for me to get back to listening to Jack's messages again.

I learned so much valuable information there about zoo humans.

And my body and soul gave me feedback on every level: "GTFO." " GTFO." "GTFO."

Today I'm working on new plans in new directions. My time here has helped shape that, and I am grateful.

### Guy Houri — 2026-05-03T11:24:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/guys-journal-surviving-the-6th-extinction.32687/post-372846>

I realized I created a previous journal in the wrong sub-thread so I am creating a new one
This was my first post - [https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/guys-journal.32382/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/guys-journal.32382/)

I want to keep updating my mito experiences
Last month I visited [@Pablo](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21859/) in Spain. It is such a wonderful experience talking to a fellow mito and sharing stories, eating BAB together, doing M-tone in sunrize, and talking about all of the lifestyle changes since becoming a mito.
It was also really nice because I didn't have to worry about food, CT, exercise, and light because I stayed with another mito. Definitely a great experience and I'm glad I met Pablo he was so kind for letting me stay with him !

After that I also met [@jcoyote](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/26925/), Evelyn, and Sara in south of france which was also amazing !

Had a bit of trouble getting back to normal because after this vacation I stopped keto and ate more carbs and took it as an excuse to eat shit lol. Also been on Instagram talking to friends and girls and I feel the addiction to tech .. fucking up my dopamine. Also some stress from work.
Although UV is really good so can't complain to much haha
I think I will get back on track soon

# Thread: Natalie’s Journal (Gold member, H1a1, Northeast TN, No COVID Jab)
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/natalie%E2%80%99s-journal-gold-member-h1a1-northeast-tn-no-covid-jab.32741/unread>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Nathov1 — 2026-05-11T21:44:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/natalie%E2%80%99s-journal-gold-member-h1a1-northeast-tn-no-covid-jab.32741/post-373762>

Lost 5 lbs in 6 days after adding some of the protocols - most of it was fat.

I could only find a place to do .9 % saline and did 1000 mL last week.

I plan to do another 1000 mL this week and continue to look for a place that can do 3 % NaCl solution.

My daylight computer shows up this week.

Using d minder to calculate vitamin D- 58 K IU in last 7 days. Wearing the tiny bikini helps, still sorting out best way to do that. I got very red in a few places last week. I’m getting morning and late afternoon sun for the red light. I could do more I think.

I’ve gotten contact information from the office to help Chris and I plan a trip to El Salvador. We were thinking sometime in the fall.

Listened again to 2016 and 2017 Vermont talk. Read the latest blogs. I plan to reread the latest blogs when I get the daylight computer while I’m outside. I find myself getting distracted while reading. I get what he is saying about dopamine issues and ability to process information.
